_notes.protocol: TJC sends: [event_type=1] [page_id] [component_id], daemon packs into u16 for switch dispatch
_notes.page_id_mapping: Page IDs are TFT firmware internal IDs. Need live printer 0x66 page reports to map ID -> page name. See inferred_pages below.

inferred_pages.1: filament (AMS/ChromaKit — P1 J/B/T commands, p114, E40 extrude, P2 A2)
inferred_pages.2: system or printing (M220 S100 speed reset, navigates to update_check)
inferred_pages.4: extruder_retract (E-1/E-10/E-20/E-50 at F300 — retract buttons, also navigates to homekey)
inferred_pages.5: system_settings (navigates to settime, G28 + park position)
inferred_pages.6: flow (M221 S%d flow control, flow.sp/flowdata screen updates)
inferred_pages.7: manual_or_temperature (SET_HEATER TARGET=220, G91 X-1 jog, navigates to choose/usb/history)
inferred_pages.8: printplan_or_print (navigates to printing, vis exp0, M220 S50/S100, G91 X+1 jog)
inferred_pages.9: setsp_and_offdet (M106 fan, setsp.sp updates, SET_GCODE_OFFSET z-adjust)
inferred_pages.10: setsp_and_chamber (M106 fan, setsp updates, Chamber_fan.CFAN_NUM, navigates to Chamber_fan)
inferred_pages.11: language_or_setup (navigates to first page, P1 B/T AMS commands, P2 A6)
inferred_pages.12: home (confirmed — popup2.pop2_num=18, calibration flow with G28+c_cail, various maintenance)
inferred_pages.14: manual_movement (G91 X/Y ±25 F7800 fast jog, G28 X, M84, P1 T1-4/B1-4 AMS, bed mesh calibrate+save)
inferred_pages.15: calibration_settings (page wait/popup1, G28+park, SAVE_CONFIG, page herdware/cutt_checking, P2 A3)

0x0106.notes: AMS filament change sequence — home, extrude, set tray

actions: GCODE: G90 G1 X310 Y290 F8000
0x0501.notes: Home all + park at service position

0x0600.notes: Flow rate adjustment with display update

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X-1 F600 G90

0x0707.notes: Multi-function: file source select, bed mesh calibrate

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X1 F600 G90

0x0901.notes: Z-offset adjustment (both up and down in same handler, direction from screen state)

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X-50 F600 G90
0x0A01.notes: Large X jog + bed mesh display

actions: GCODE: G90 G1 X149 Y290 F4000
GCODE: G90 G1 X149 Y321 F4000
GCODE: G90 G1 X124 Y321 F4000
GCODE: G91 G1 Z10 F600 G90
0x0C03.notes: Home page calibration button: lift Z, home, navigate to calibration, move to positions

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X-0.5 F6000 G90
GCODE: G91 G1 X0.5 F6000 G90
0x0C05.notes: Home page maintenance: nozzle wipe sequence with fan on/off

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X-25 F7800 G90
GCODE: G91 G1 Y-25 F7800 G90
GCODE: G91 G1 X25 F7800 G90
GCODE: G91 G1 Y25 F7800 G90
GCODE: G90 M140 S60 M104 S140 G28 G90 M106 S255 BED_MESH_CLEAR BED_MESH_CALIBRATE PROFILE=phrozen SAVE_CONFIG
0x0E01.notes: Manual page: multi-function — fast XY jog, AMS tray select, full auto-calibrate sequence

0x0F00.notes: Show wait page or confirmation popup

actions: GCODE: G90 G1 X310 Y260 F6000
0x0F01.notes: Lift Z, home XY, park at service position

actions: GCODE: G91 G1 X-50 F600 G90
GCODE: G91 G1 X±1 F600 G90
0x0F02.notes: Save config, disable heater, navigate to hardware page

0x0F04.notes: Start cutting check: home, send P2 A3, preheat nozzle
